name: Wailuku
description_short: Wailuku Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union in Kahului, Hawaii offering mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and credit counseling to local members.
description_long:
Wailuku Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving the Maui community from its single branch location in Kahului, Hawaii. As a not-for-profit, member-owned institution regulated by the NCUA, it operates under a community-focused mission described as "A Local Credit Union That Cares." The credit union has been serving its membership for over a decade, as evidenced by member testimonials noting 11+ years of service.

Wailuku FCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer lending products including mortgage loans (as low as 4.875% APR), auto loans (as low as 4.25% APR), personal loans (as low as 6.00% APR), and home equity lines of credit. They also provide specialized financing for renewable energy (photovoltaic/solar) loans. Members can access online banking, mobile banking through their Mobiliti platform, and payment services via MessagePay. The credit union offers credit counseling services and notary services to members.

The institution distinguishes itself through personalized member service, with members specifically naming staff members Alyssa, Kellie, and Brandi in testimonials and describing the branch atmosphere as welcoming and family-like. Their specialization in renewable energy financing reflects community commitment to sustainability. The credit union maintains competitive rates and offers accessible customer service during standard business hours (Monday-Friday, 9 AM to 4:45 PM).

As a single-branch credit union, Wailuku FCU is limited to serving members primarily in the Kahului/Maui area, which may restrict accessibility for those outside Hawaii. Like all credit unions, membership eligibility may be restricted to those meeting specific criteria. The institution's hours are standard business hours only with no weekend availability, and service scope is more limited than larger financial institutions.
pros: Competitive auto loan rates as low as 4.25% APR
Mortgage financing available as low as 4.875% APR
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure returns profits to members
Personalized service with staff recognized by name in member testimonials
Online banking and mobile banking (Mobiliti) platform available
Free credit counseling services available to members
cons: Single branch location in Kahului limits accessibility to local Maui residents only
No weekend or extended hours; limited to Monday-Friday 9 AM to 4:45 PM
Membership eligibility may be restricted based on credit union field of membership criteria
Limited branch network compared to banks; no ATM network details provided
Small institution may have fewer product options than larger credit unions or banks
best_for: Kahului and Maui-area residents seeking personalized, local lending relationships
Homebuyers interested in competitive mortgage rates with personal service
Members interested in solar/renewable energy financing with credit union support
Hawaii residents seeking NCUA-insured savings and lending products from a community-focused institution
diagnosis: Wailuku Federal Credit Union is best for Maui-based consumers seeking competitive rates and personalized member service from a local, not-for-profit credit union. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership and services are restricted to the Kahului/Maui area, making it inaccessible for residents outside Hawaii.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Wailuku — Credit Union in KAHULUI, HI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Wailuku — NCUA-insured credit union in KAHULUI, HI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
